Cases with citations of Janardhanam Prasad v. Ramdas

How did the Supreme Court apply the doctrine of relation back and Section 14(1) of the Hindu Succession Act, 1956 to determine whether the alienations made by defendant No.1 were binding on the adopted son?
Which specific alienations were upheld and which were set aside by the Supreme Court, and what was the legal basis for treating the sale deed and gift deed differently in the final decision?
